summary: Tested Training Application form updates (Step 3 & Step 4). All 11 features verified and working correctly: Training Date picker, Training Delivery dropdown, Supplier Type options, Internal Training behavior, SCM route behavior, R15,000 threshold logic, International supplier SBD forms, and View Summary dialog.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility - minor a11y issue

critical_code_review_comments: All 11 features implemented correctly and working as specified
Training Date is now a date picker (type='date') instead of dropdown
Training Delivery dropdown has Digital and Non-digital options
Supplier Type dropdown has all 4 options: Preferred supplier (Local), Preferred supplier (International), SCM route, Internal Training
Internal Training auto-sets Service Provider to 'Sentech' and disables Service Provider & Total Amount fields
Internal Training on Step 4 shows 'No Documents Required' message with NO file upload inputs
SCM route disables Training Date, Training Delivery, Training Type, Total Amount fields on Step 3
SCM route on Step 4 shows ONLY Scope of Work upload
Preferred supplier (Local) with amount <= R15,000 shows Signed Performance Contract (NOT Motivation)
Preferred supplier (Local) with amount > R15,000 shows Motivation (NOT Performance Contract)
Preferred supplier (International) shows SBD 1 Form instead of SBD 4 Form
View Summary dialog correctly displays Training Date, Training Delivery, and Supplier Type labels

features_verified.test_1_training_date_picker: PASS - Training Date is type='date' (date picker)
features_verified.test_2_training_delivery_dropdown: PASS - Has Digital and Non-digital options
features_verified.test_3_supplier_type_options: PASS - All 4 options present: Preferred supplier (Local), Preferred supplier (International), SCM route, Internal Training
features_verified.test_4_internal_training_auto_set: PASS - Service Provider auto-set to 'Sentech', both Service Provider and Total Amount disabled
features_verified.test_5_internal_training_no_docs: PASS - Step 4 shows 'No Documents Required' message, NO file upload inputs visible
features_verified.test_6_scm_route_disabled_fields: PASS - Training Date, Training Delivery, Training Type, Total Amount all disabled
features_verified.test_6_scm_route_only_scope_of_work: PASS - Step 4 shows ONLY Scope of Work upload
features_verified.test_7_preferred_local_under_15k: PASS - Shows Signed Performance Contract, NOT Motivation
features_verified.test_8_preferred_local_over_15k: PASS - Shows Motivation, NOT Performance Contract
features_verified.test_9_preferred_international_sbd1: PASS - Shows SBD 1 Form, NOT SBD 4 Form
features_verified.test_10_view_summary_dialog: PASS - Shows Training Date, Training Delivery, Supplier Type with correct labels

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test employee account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Application form Step 3 and Step 4 updates fully verified. All conditional logic for Supplier Type (Internal Training, SCM route, Preferred Local/International) working correctly. R15,000 threshold logic for Motivation vs Performance Contract working. View Summary dialog shows all new fields correctly.
